svg.text: [WIND SPEED APPROACHING SAFE LIMIT OF 55 KM/H]
[SEARCH BAR — TYPE TO FIND HELP TOPIC]
[Step 1: Navigate to Dashboard from the left sidebar.]
[Step 2: Review telemetry cards at the top of screen.]
[Step 3: Use the live map to track UAV GPS position.]
[Step 4: Monitor live video feed on the right panel.]
[Step 5: Check wind status widget for conditions.]
[Step 6: Click any panel for detailed telemetry view.]
